|desc=This {{p|Lapras}} serves as Lana's Ride Pokémon. It was first seen in ''[[SM001|Alola to New Adventure!]]'', where Lana rode on it while fishing. In ''[[SM005|Yo, Ho, Ho! Go, Popplio!]]'', it was seen in flashback being used to battle against some {{tc|Team Skull Grunt}}s that were bullying a wild {{p|Popplio}}. When not in use, it resides in the water next to Lana's house.

Lapras was used again in ''[[SM026|So Long, Sophocles!]]'' where Lana took {{an|Sophocles}} and {{TP|Sophocles|Togedemaru}} out to sea so that they could see a {{p|Wailord}} breaching out of the water.

It briefly appeared in the [[Poké Problem]] segment of [[SM079]], residing in the water next to Lana's house as [[Lana's mother]] and [[Harper and Sarah|sisters]] were watching the {{p|Minior}} shower.

In ''[[JN037|That New Old Gang of Mine!]]'', Lana was seen riding on Lapras after she saved [[Goh]] from drowning.

Lapras's only known move is {{m|Ice Beam}}.}}
